name: vscode-qq-copilot-connector
description: VS Code QQ Connector with QQBot MCP tools, Copilot integration, and an optional local QQ backend mode.

commands.title: QQ Connector: Redirect Message To VS Code Chat
QQ Connector: Open QQ Assistant Chat
QQ Connector: Open Another Extension Development Host

chatParticipants.name: qq
chatParticipants.description: A QQ-aware assistant backed by VS Code language models, tools, and the local bridge.

qqConnector.backendMode.description: Backend mode. 'local' uses a compatible local QQ backend, 'qqbot' uses the official QQ Bot API. Reload window after changing this value.

qqConnector.rootDir.description: Local backend root directory. Supports absolute path or workspace-relative path.

qqConnector.quickLoginUin.description: Optional QQ UIN for quick login on Windows. If set, the extension starts the backend launcher with this UIN first.

qqConnector.tokenFile.description: Optional token file path. If set, token auto-read tries this file first.

qqConnector.tokenEnvVar.description: Environment variable name used when qqConnector.token is empty.

qqConnector.autoConnect.description: Auto connect when VS Code starts.

qqConnector.maxMessagesPerChat.description: Maximum number of cached messages for each chat in the sidebar.

qqConnector.qqbotAppId.description: QQBot official AppID. The extension uses QQBot mode by default.

qqConnector.qqbotBotName.description: Display name shown in the sidebar for the QQ assistant.

qqConnector.qqbotMarkdownSupport.description: Use official QQBot markdown messages when sending text.

qqConnector.qqbotPrimaryChatType.description: Default QQBot conversation type used by MCP send tools when no targetId is provided.

qqConnector.qqbotPrimaryChatId.description: Default QQBot targetId used by MCP send tools when no targetId is provided.

qqConnector.qqbotAutoReply.description: Automatically route incoming QQ messages through the QQ assistant and send the reply back to QQ.

qqConnector.qqbotUseTools.description: Allow the assistant to use available VS Code and MCP tools for QQ requests.

qqConnector.qqbotModelVendor.description: Preferred language model vendor for QQBot auto-reply. Leave empty to use any available model.

qqConnector.qqbotModelFamily.description: Optional preferred language model family for QQBot auto-reply.

qqConnector.qqbotSystemPrompt.default: 你是在 VS Code 中运行的 QQBot 助手。回答要直接、简洁、准确。必要时可以调用可用工具。
qqConnector.qqbotSystemPrompt.description: System prompt prefix used for QQBot auto-reply.

qqConnector.qqbotRemoteAllowNativeUiTool.description: Allow QQ-triggered requests to use native VS Code confirmation UIs. Keep this off unless you explicitly want local popups.

qqConnector.qqbotMaxToolRounds.description: Maximum number of tool-calling rounds for a single QQ request.

qqConnector.chatBridgeEnabled.description: Enable the local HTTP bridge for forwarding requests into the QQ assistant pipeline.

qqConnector.chatBridgePort.description: Port used by the local HTTP bridge.

qqConnector.chatBridgeToken.description: Optional bearer token required by the local HTTP bridge.

qqConnector.chatBridgeDefaultMode.description: Default handling mode for HTTP bridge requests.

qqConnector.chatBridgeAutoSend.description: Automatically submit HTTP bridge requests after they are accepted.

qqConnector.chatBridgeMirrorOutput.description: Mirror bridge request output back into the local QQ assistant pipeline.
